free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 104 MeV
The cross sections tabulated in KFK-1662 B-14 could
be a factor of 1000 too low.
Fig.2 of Nucl.Phys.A128(1969)81 shows the Rutherford
ratio approaches to 1 at the most forwarding angle.
Accordingly the cross sections tabulated in KFK-1662
were therefore multiplied by 1000 accordingly in this
On. Data multiplied by 1000 with CRITIQUE.
